chunks.text: ORDER SHEET HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT HYDERABAD Crl. Revision Application No.S-157 of 2015 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S) 1. For order on M.A No.10780/2025 (U/A) 2. For order on M.A No.10274/2025 (Exemption) 3. For order on M.A No.10275/2025 (Return of surety) 15.12.2025 Mr.Raza Ali Halepoto, Advocate for applicant/surety Mr.Khalid Hussain Lakho, D.P.G (present in court in other matters, waives notice) ********* 1. Granted. 2. Granted subject to all just exceptions 3. Through this application, applicant No.8 Abul Hussain, for himself and as attorney of the other applicants/legal heirs of deceased surety Qazeem-ul-Din, seeks release of the surety furnished by their father in the present matter. In support of their claim, the applicants have attached the Family Registration Certificate (FRC), which confirms that they are the legal heirs of deceased surety Qazeem‐ul‐Din. It is contended that vide Order dated 05.10.2015, the applicant/accused Shahid was granted bail by this Court and the required surety was duly submitted by the deceased surety. It is further contended that vide Judgment dated 26.08.2024, the Criminal Revision Application was allowed and the impugned judgment dated 30.07.2015, whereby the applicant/accused was convicted, was set aside, and the surety furnished by the deceased surety was discharged. As such, the surety furnished before this Court is no longer required. Learned D.P.G after going through the record, tendered his no objection for release of surety. In view of above, listed application stands disposed of with direction to the office to release/return the surety to applicant, however, after due verification and identification as per procedure.

Learned D.P.G after going through the record, tendered his no objection for release of surety. In view of above, listed application stands disposed of with direction to the office to release/return the surety to applicant, however, after due verification and identification as per procedure. JUDGE AHSAN K. ABRO
